alerts.title: Khamenei reportedly demands enriched uranium stockpile remain inside Iran
alerts.summary: Reuters cites Iranian sources saying Supreme Leader Khamenei insists Iran's ~60% enriched uranium stockpile must stay on Iranian soil, directly contradicting reported US assurances to Israel that no deal will proceed without dismantling the nuclear program. Haaretz and Jerusalem Post flag the nuclear question as the unresolved sticking point hours from a possible agreement; threat level remains at 9/10 (CRITICAL) and breakout time at ~1-2 weeks.

alerts.title: Secret Service kills gunman who opened fire near White House while Trump inside
alerts.summary: Rybar (~110K views) reports Secret Service shot a 21-year-old, identified as Nasir Best, who opened fire at the intersection of 17th Street and Pennsylvania Avenue while President Trump was in residence; journalists on the lawn were evacuated to the briefing room. The suspect was reportedly previously detained for attempting to breach the White House perimeter last July. US sentiment word cloud shows 'secret' and 'service' newly trending, suggesting corroboration in US press.

alerts.title: Republican hawks publicly revolt against Trump's emerging Iran deal
alerts.summary: Middle East Eye, citing Republican hawks, calls the emerging Iran agreement a 'nightmare for Israel,' with US sentiment data showing sharp upticks in 'hawks' (7), 'Tillis' (7), 'Hegseth' (9), 'Gabbard' (7) and 'GOP/Republican criticism' (18 combined) alongside 57% negative US sentiment. The intra-GOP backlash threatens domestic ratification of the Hormuz/non-attack framework even as Trump calls it 'largely negotiated.'

alerts.title: NATO rehearses deep strikes into Russia under 'Arcade Strike' exercise in London
alerts.summary: DeepState UA (~189K views) reports NATO's Allied Rapid Reaction Corps (ARRC) set up a forward HQ on a disused platform at London's Charing Cross station to wargame deep strikes into Russian territory in response to a simulated Russian invasion of a Baltic state, testing EW, comms jamming and counter-drone capabilities. The exercise marks an unusually overt rehearsal of Article 5 retaliation against Moscow.

alerts.title: Heavy overnight Russian missile barrage hits Kyiv industrial and admin sites
alerts.summary: Rybar (~113K views) reports multiple missile impacts in Kyiv's Solomyansky district overnight, striking the 'Lahoda' business park, the Kyiv aviation plant, a former relay-and-automation plant and an armored-vehicles facility, with fires across the capital. The wave follows the disputed Oreshnik MIRV strikes flagged in prior cycles and signals sustained Russian targeting of Ukrainian defense-industrial infrastructure.

analysis_note: Despite a near-final US-Iran framework, Khamenei's reported insistence on retaining 60% enriched uranium, a GOP-hawk revolt in Washington, and a fresh White House shooting incident are pulling the strategic picture back toward crisis even as carriers remain forward-deployed and Russia escalates strikes on Kyiv.
